Bash(node -e "const { DeepgramClient } = require\('./node_modules/@deepgram/sdk/dist/cjs/index.js'\); const c = new DeepgramClient\({ apiKey: 'test' }\); console.log\('listen keys:', Object.getOwnPropertyNames\(Object.getPrototypeOf\(c.listen\)\)\); console.log\('listen v1 keys:', Object.getOwnPropertyNames\(Object.getPrototypeOf\(c.listen.v1\)\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const { DeepgramClient } = require\('./node_modules/@deepgram/sdk/dist/cjs/index.js'\); const c = new DeepgramClient\({ apiKey: 'test' }\); const conn = c.listen.v1.createConnection\(\); console.log\('conn type:', conn.constructor.name\); console.log\('conn proto keys:', Object.getOwnPropertyNames\(Object.getPrototypeOf\(conn\)\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const src = require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('./node_modules/@deepgram/sdk/dist/cjs/CustomClient.js', 'utf8'\); const events = src.match\(/this\\.emit\\\(['\\"]\([^'\\"]+\)['\\"]/g\)?.map\(m => m.match\(/['\\"]\([^'\\"]+\)['\\"]$/\)[1]\); console.log\([...new Set\(events\)]\)")

Bash(node -e "const src = require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('./node_modules/@deepgram/sdk/dist/cjs/CustomClient.js', 'utf8'\); const m = src.match\(/emit\\\(\\"[^\\"]+\\"/g\); console.log\([...new Set\(m\)]?.slice\(0,30\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const src = require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('./node_modules/@deepgram/sdk/dist/cjs/api/resources/listen/resources/v1/client/Client.js', 'utf8'\); const m = src.match\(/smart_format.*?[,}]/\); console.log\(m?.[0]\)")

Bash(node -e "const d = require\('./node_modules/@deepgram/sdk/dist/cjs/index.js'\); console.log\('InterimResults:', d.ListenV1InterimResults\); console.log\('SmartFormat:', d.ListenV1SmartFormat\); console.log\('Punctuate:', d.ListenV1Punctuate\)")
Bash(perl -0pi -e 's/keyGenerator: \\\(req: Request\\\) => \\\(req as any\\\)\\.user\\?\\.id \\?\\? req\\.ip \\?\\? "anonymous",/keyGenerator: userOrIpKey,/g' src/middlewares/rateLimits.ts)

PowerShell(if \(Test-Path .env\) { $hasDb = Select-String -Path .env -Pattern "^DATABASE_URL=" -Quiet; Write-Output "ENV_EXISTS: true; HAS_DATABASE_URL: $hasDb" } else { Write-Output "ENV_EXISTS: false" })

PowerShell($conns = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($conns\) { $pids = $conns.OwningProcess | Select-Object -Unique; foreach \($p in $pids\) { try { Stop-Process -Id $p -Force -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Output "Stopped PID $p" } catch { Write-Output "Could not stop PID $p : $_" } } } else { Write-Output "No listener on port 8000" })
